message:
feat(freeze): Convert standard function emission to support Zig

Implemented Zig code generation for function scaffolding:
- emitStackDecl() - var stack/sp with Zig types
- emitLocalsDecl() - var locals with Zig for loop
- Updated standard function path to use helpers
- Zig: uses qjs. prefix for QuickJS types
- Zig: uses _ = param instead of (void)param
- Zig: uses i64 instead of int64_t

Status: Function structure working, block bodies still emit C code.

Next: Convert emitBlock() and instruction emission (opcode handlers).
